<!-- Claudesy's vision, brought to life. -->
---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement for the Puskesmas Balowerti website
title: "feat: [short description of the feature]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A concise description of the feature or improvement you are proposing.

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem this feature solves. Why is the current experience insufficient?

**Example:** "As a patient, I find it difficult to locate the emergency contact number quickly because..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of the solution you would like implemented.

## Alternative Approaches Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered, and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## User Impact

Who benefits from this feature, and how?

- [ ] Patients seeking appointment information
- [ ] Patients looking for doctor schedules
- [ ] BPJS insurance holders navigating the flow
- [ ] General visitors browsing services
- [ ] Clinic staff (via Crew Portal)

## Acceptance Criteria

Define what "done" looks like for this feature:

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Additional Context

Add mockups, screenshots, examples from other websites, or any other context.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and feature requests.
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's goal of providing accessible healthcare information.
- [ ] Content for this feature would be in **Bahasa Indonesia**.
